name: Delray Indoor Golf Center
address: 14590 S Military Trl Space E-5, Delray Beach, FL 33484
about: Delray Indoor Golf Center is an indoor golf training facility equipped with launch monitors in each bay, allowing players to measure and track their progress. The facility uses advanced technology including Smart2Move Dual Force Plates, video analysis, and GolfForever for swing drills and exercises. It caters to a wide range of players, from beginners to tour professionals, with various membership options and hourly rental rates available. The venue offers a professional, educational atmosphere focused on improvement and game development.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including Smart2Move Dual Force Plates and launch monitors
BioSwing Dynamics instruction tailored to individual movement patterns
Comprehensive swing analysis with video and data tracking
Indoor lab setting ideal for chipping, pitching, and putting practice

food_and_drink.notes: No information on food service provided.
No information on alcohol service provided.

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need your own golf clubs. The facility does not mention providing club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no information on whether outside food and drink are permitted. No food or beverage service is mentioned on the website.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the time required to play a full 18-hole simulation, as this can vary depending on the game mode and number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically market itself as kid-friendly. The instruction philosophy focuses on individual movement patterns, which could be adapted for juniors, but there are no dedicated junior programs or mentioned amenities for children.
